2605.15030.title: WARD: Adversarially Robust Defense of Web Agents Against Prompt Injections
2605.15030.paper_summary: Web agents can autonomously complete online tasks by interacting with websites, but their exposure to open web environments makes them vulnerable to prompt injection attacks embedded in HTML content or visual interfaces. Existing guard models still suffer from limited generalization to unseen domains and attack patterns, high false positive rates on benign content, reduced deployment efficiency due to added latency at each step, and vulnerability to adversarial attacks that evolve over time or directly target the guard itself. To address these limitations, we propose WARD (Web Agent Robust Defense against Prompt Injection), a practical guard model for secure and efficient web agents. WARD is built on WARD-Base, a large-scale dataset with around 177K samples collected from 719 high-traffic URLs and platforms, and WARD-PIG, a dedicated dataset designed for prompt injection attacks targeting the guard model. We further introduce A3T, an adaptive adversarial attack training framework that iteratively strengthens WARD through a memory-based attacker and guard co-evolution process. Extensive experiments show that WARD achieves nearly perfect recall on out-of-distribution benchmarks, maintains low false positive rates to preserve agent utility, remains robust against guard-targeted and adaptive attacks under substantial distribution shifts, and runs efficiently in parallel with the agent without introducing additional latency.
2605.15030.paper_summary_zh: 網路代理可以通過與網站互動自主完成在線任務，但它們在開放的網路環境中的暴露使其容易受到嵌入在 HTML 內容或視覺介面中的提示注入攻擊。現有的防護模型仍然面臨對未見領域和攻擊模式的有限泛化、在良性內容上高假陽性率、由於每一步增加的延遲而降低的部署效率，以及對隨時間演變或直接針對防護本身的對抗性攻擊的脆弱性。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了 WARD（Web Agent Robust Defense against Prompt Injection），這是一個為安全和高效網路代理設計的實用防護模型。WARD 基於 WARD-Base，這是一個從 719 個高流量 URL 和平台收集的約 177K 樣本的大規模數據集，以及 WARD-PIG，這是一個專門為針對防護模型的提示注入攻擊設計的數據集。我們進一步介紹了 A3T，一個自適應對抗攻擊訓練框架，通過基於記憶的攻擊者和防護共同演化過程迭代增強 WARD。大量實驗表明，WARD 在分佈外基準上幾乎達到完美的召回率，保持低假陽性率以保護代理的效用，對於在顯著分佈變化下的針對防護的和自適應攻擊保持穩健，並且能夠與代理高效並行運行而不引入額外的延遲。
2605.15030.author: Tri Cao et.al.
2605.15030.authors: Tri Cao, Yulin Chen, Hieu Cao, Yibo Li, Khoi Le, Thong Nguyen, Yuexin Li, Yufei He, Yue Liu, Shuicheng Yan, Bryan Hooi
